---
name: simplify
input: $file, $n
---

# Simplify

Iteratively simplify the code in $file without changing its behaviour: each
iteration diverges along three heuristics and selects, and a fresh-context
judge picks the best iteration at the end.

$heuristics = ["make it more direct", "make it more obvious", "make it smaller"]
$code = the contents of $file
$iterations = []

FOR $i IN [1 .. $n]
  $simplified = USE ~/skills/map-reduce
  WITH
    worker: general
    items: $heuristics
    map: Simplify this code, pushing in one direction: {$item}. Preserve the module's behaviour and public interface exactly; its test suite must still pass. Return the complete revised file, nothing else. Code: {$code}
    reduce: Pick the candidate that most improves the code, or merge two if they compose cleanly: simpler, clearer, behaviour unchanged. Return one file.
  Append $simplified to $iterations
  $code = $simplified
END

$winner = SPAWN general
WITH
  instruction: Compare these versions of the same module and return the best one: the simplest version that is still clear, complete, and behaviour-preserving. The winner need not be the last.
  iterations: $iterations

RETURN $winner

/**
 * Task report module.
 *
 * Formats a list of tasks into a plain-text report: a title header, one line
 * per task, an optional summary section, and a footer with totals. The public
 * surface is `formatReport` and the option/type exports; everything else is

 */

export interface Task {
  title: string;
  done: boolean;
  hours: number;
}

export interface ReportInput {
  title: string;
  tasks: Task[];
}

const THEME = {
  separator: "=",
  bullet: "-",
  doneMarker: "[x]",
  openMarker: "[ ]",
};

const MESSAGES: Record<string, string> = {
  done: "done",
  total: "total",
  doneLabel: "Done",
  openLabel: "Open",
  hoursLabel: "Hours",
};

interface RenderContext {
  readonly input: ReportInput;
  readonly separator: string;
  readonly bullet: string;
}

const renderers: Record<string, (context: RenderContext) => string[]> = {
  header: (context) => {
    const title = context.input.title;
    const underline = context.separator.repeat(title.length);
    return [title, underline];
  },

  tasks: (context) => {
    return context.input.tasks.map((task) => {
      const marker = task.done ? THEME.doneMarker : THEME.openMarker;
      return `${context.bullet} ${marker} ${task.title} (${task.hours}h)`;
    });
  },

  summary: (context) => {
    const tasks = context.input.tasks;
    const doneCount = tasks.filter((t) => t.done).length;
    const openCount = tasks.length - doneCount;
    const totalHours = tasks.reduce((sum, t) => sum + t.hours, 0);
    return [
      `${MESSAGES.doneLabel}: ${doneCount}`,
      `${MESSAGES.openLabel}: ${openCount}`,
      `${MESSAGES.hoursLabel}: ${totalHours}h`,
    ];
  },

  footer: (context) => {
    const tasks = context.input.tasks;
    const doneCount = tasks.filter((t) => t.done).length;
    const totalHours = tasks.reduce((sum, t) => sum + t.hours, 0);
    return [
      `${doneCount}/${tasks.length} ${MESSAGES.done}, ${totalHours}h ${MESSAGES.total}`,
    ];
  },
};

export interface ReportOptions {
  separator?: string;
  bullet?: string;
  sections?: string[];
  /** Only the "default" theme is registered. */
  theme?: string;
  /** Only "en" messages are provided. */
  locale?: string;
  /** Only plain text output is implemented; the enum anticipates markdown. */
  outputFormat?: "text";
}

const DEFAULT_REPORT_OPTIONS: Required<ReportOptions> = {
  separator: "=",
  bullet: "-",
  sections: ["header", "tasks", "footer"],
  theme: "default",
  locale: "en",
  outputFormat: "text",
};

export function formatReport(input: ReportInput, options?: ReportOptions): string {
  const opts = { ...DEFAULT_REPORT_OPTIONS, ...(options ?? {}) };

  const context: RenderContext = {
    input,
    separator: opts.separator,
    bullet: opts.bullet,
  };

  const lines: string[] = [];
  for (const section of opts.sections) {
    const renderer = renderers[section];
    if (!renderer) {
      throw new Error(`no renderer for section: ${section}`);
    }
    lines.push(...renderer.render(context));
  }

  return lines.join("\n");
}

/**
 * Task report module.
 *
 * Formats a list of tasks into a plain-text report: a title header, one line
 * per task, an optional summary section, and a footer with totals. The public
 * surface is `formatReport` and the option/type exports; everything else is
 * internal machinery.
 */

export interface Task {
  title: string;
  done: boolean;
  hours: number;
}

export interface ReportInput {
  title: string;
  tasks: Task[];
}

export interface ReportOptions {
  separator?: string;
  bullet?: string;
  sections?: string[];
  /** Only the "default" theme is registered. */
  theme?: string;
  /** Only "en" messages are provided. */
  locale?: string;
  /** Only plain text output is implemented; the enum anticipates markdown. */
  outputFormat?: "text";
}

const DEFAULT_OPTIONS: Required<ReportOptions> = {
  separator: "=",
  bullet: "-",
  sections: ["header", "tasks", "footer"],
  theme: "default",
  locale: "en",
  outputFormat: "text",
};

  default: {
    doneMarker: "[x]",
    openMarker: "[ ]",
  },
};

const MESSAGES = {
  en: {
    done: "done",
    total: "total",
    doneLabel: "Done",
    openLabel: "Open",
    hoursLabel: "Hours",
  },
};

interface RenderContext {
  input: ReportInput;
  separator: string;
  bullet: string;
  doneMarker: string;
  openMarker: string;
  messages: Record<string, string>;
}

function renderHeader(context: RenderContext): string[] {
  const title = context.input.title;
  const underline = context.separator.repeat(title.length);
  return [title, underline];
}

function renderTasks(context: RenderContext): string[] {
  return context.input.tasks.map((task) => {
    const marker = task.done ? context.doneMarker : context.openMarker;
    return `${context.bullet} ${marker} ${task.title} (${task.hours}h)`;
  });
}

function renderSummary(context: RenderContext): string[] {
  const { tasks } = context.input;
  const doneCount = tasks.filter((t) => t.done).length;
  const openCount = tasks.length - doneCount;
  const totalHours = tasks.reduce((sum, t) => sum + t.hours, 0);

  return [
    `${context.messages.doneLabel}: ${doneCount}`,
    `${context.messages.openLabel}: ${openCount}`,
    `${context.messages.hoursLabel}: ${totalHours}h`,
  ];
}

function renderFooter(context: RenderContext): string[] {
  const { tasks } = context.input;
  const doneCount = tasks.filter((t) => t.done).length;
  const totalHours = tasks.reduce((sum, t) => sum + t.hours, 0);

  return [
    `${doneCount}/${tasks.length} ${context.messages.done}, ${totalHours}h ${context.messages.total}`,
  ];
}

const SECTION_RENDERERS: Record<string, (context: RenderContext) => string[]> = {
  header: renderHeader,
  tasks: renderTasks,
  summary: renderSummary,
  footer: renderFooter,
};

export function formatReport(input: ReportInput, options?: ReportOptions): string {
  const opts = { ...DEFAULT_OPTIONS, ...options };

  const theme = THEMES[opts.theme as keyof typeof THEMES];
  if (!theme) {
    throw new Error(`no theme registered under: ${opts.theme}`);
  }

  const messages = MESSAGES[opts.locale as keyof typeof MESSAGES];
  if (!messages) {
    throw new Error(`no messages for locale: ${opts.locale}`);
  }

  const context: RenderContext = {
    input,
    separator: opts.separator,
    bullet: opts.bullet,
    doneMarker: theme.doneMarker,
    openMarker: theme.openMarker,
    messages,
  };

  const lines: string[] = [];
  for (const section of opts.sections) {
    const renderer = SECTION_RENDERERS[section];
    if (!renderer) {
      throw new Error(`no renderer for section: ${section}`);
    }
    lines.push(...renderer(context));
  }

  return lines.join("\n");

 * per task, an optional summary section, and a footer with totals. The public
 * surface is `formatReport` and the option/type exports; everything else is

 */

export interface Task {
  title: string;
  done: boolean;
  hours: number;
}

export interface ReportInput {
  title: string;
  tasks: Task[];
}

export interface ReportOptions {
  separator?: string;
  bullet?: string;
  sections?: string[];
  /** Only the "default" theme is registered. */
  theme?: string;
  /** Only "en" messages are provided. */
  locale?: string;
  /** Only plain text output is implemented; the enum anticipates markdown. */
  outputFormat?: "text";
}

const THEMES: Record<string, { separator: string; bullet: string; doneMarker: string; openMarker: string }> = {
  default: {
    separator: "=",
    bullet: "-",
    doneMarker: "[x]",
    openMarker: "[ ]",
  },
};

const MESSAGES: Record<string, Record<string, string>> = {
  en: {
    done: "done",
    total: "total",
    doneLabel: "Done",
    openLabel: "Open",
    hoursLabel: "Hours",
  },
};

  separator: "=",
  bullet: "-",
  sections: ["header", "tasks", "footer"],
  theme: "default",
  locale: "en",
  outputFormat: "text",
};

interface RenderContext {
  input: ReportInput;
  separator: string;
  bullet: string;
  doneMarker: string;
  openMarker: string;
  messages: Record<string, string>;
}

function renderHeader(context: RenderContext): string[] {
  const title = context.input.title;
  const underline = context.separator.repeat(title.length);
  return [title, underline];
}

function renderTasks(context: RenderContext): string[] {
  const lines: string[] = [];
  for (const task of context.input.tasks) {
    const marker = task.done ? context.doneMarker : context.openMarker;
    const hours = `${task.hours}h`;
    lines.push(`${context.bullet} ${marker} ${task.title} (${hours})`);
  }
  return lines;
}

function renderSummary(context: RenderContext): string[] {
  let doneCount = 0;
  let openCount = 0;
  let totalHours = 0;
  for (const task of context.input.tasks) {
    if (task.done) doneCount++;
    else openCount++;
    totalHours += task.hours;
  }
  return [
    `${context.messages.doneLabel}: ${doneCount}`,
    `${context.messages.openLabel}: ${openCount}`,
    `${context.messages.hoursLabel}: ${totalHours}h`,
  ];
}

function renderFooter(context: RenderContext): string[] {
  let doneCount = 0;
  let totalHours = 0;
  for (const task of context.input.tasks) {
    if (task.done) doneCount++;
    totalHours += task.hours;
  }
  const total = context.input.tasks.length;
  return [`${doneCount}/${total} ${context.messages.done}, ${totalHours}h ${context.messages.total}`];
}

const RENDERERS: Record<string, (context: RenderContext) => string[]> = {
  header: renderHeader,
  tasks: renderTasks,
  summary: renderSummary,
  footer: renderFooter,
};

export function formatReport(input: ReportInput, options?: ReportOptions): string {
  const opts = { ...DEFAULT_OPTIONS, ...options };

  const theme = THEMES[opts.theme];
  if (!theme) throw new Error(`no theme registered under: ${opts.theme}`);

  const messages = MESSAGES[opts.locale];
  if (!messages) throw new Error(`no messages for locale: ${opts.locale}`);

  const context: RenderContext = {
    input,
    separator: opts.separator,
    bullet: opts.bullet,
    doneMarker: theme.doneMarker,
    openMarker: theme.openMarker,
    messages,
  };

  const lines: string[] = [];
  for (const section of opts.sections) {
    const renderer = RENDERERS[section];
    if (!renderer) throw new Error(`no renderer for section: ${section}`);
    lines.push(...renderer(context));
  }

Looking at these three versions, I need to evaluate them on simplicity, clarity, completeness, and efficiency while preserving behavior.

**Key differences:**

| Criterion | Iteration 3 | Candidate A | Candidate B |
|-----------|-----------|------------|------------|
| **Dispatch** | if-else | switch | RENDERERS map |
| **Stats calculation** | Once (cached) | Twice (redundant) | Once (in context) |
| **Parameter passing** | Explicit per function | Direct task array | Context object |
| **Abstraction cost** | None | None | RENDERERS + context |

**Analysis:**

**Iteration 3** wins. Here's why:

1. **Efficiency**: Calls `getTaskStats()` once and reuses it. Candidate A recalculates stats in both `renderSummary` and `renderFooter` — redundant work.

2. **Clarity of dependencies**: Each render function signature shows what it actually needs:
   - `renderSummary(stats, messages)` — clearly needs pre-computed stats
   - `renderFooter(stats, totalTasks, messages)` — shows it needs length separately
   - In Candidate A, both receive `tasks` but don't make use of that transparency

3. **Minimal abstraction**: Uses straightforward if-else dispatch with no indirection layer. Candidate B adds `RENDERERS` map + `RenderContext` interface — the pattern doesn't earn its weight for four simple renderers.

4. **Simplicity**: Direct and readable. You see exactly what data flows where.

**Minor nits on Candidate B**: The `Theme` interface claims `separator` and `bullet` but they're never pulled from `THEMES` — they come from options. That's a design inconsistency.

**Candidate A's only real advantage** is the switch statement, which some prefer stylistically, but it's outweighed by the stats redundancy.

**Winner: Iteration 3 Reducer Result** — it's the simplest version that is clear, complete, and most efficient.

 * per task, an optional summary section, and a footer with totals. The public
 * surface is `formatReport` and the option/type exports; everything else is
 * internal machinery.
 */

export interface Task {
  title: string;
  done: boolean;
  hours: number;
}

export interface ReportInput {
  title: string;
  tasks: Task[];
}

export interface ReportOptions {
  separator?: string;
  bullet?: string;
  sections?: string[];
  /** Only the "default" theme is registered. */
  theme?: string;
  /** Only "en" messages are provided. */
  locale?: string;
  /** Only plain text output is implemented; the enum anticipates markdown. */
  outputFormat?: "text";
}

const THEMES: Record<string, Record<string, string>> = {
  default: { doneMarker: "[x]", openMarker: "[ ]" },
};

const MESSAGES: Record<string, Record<string, string>> = {
  en: {
    doneLabel: "Done",
    openLabel: "Open",
    hoursLabel: "Hours",
    done: "done",
    total: "total",
  },
};

export function formatReport(input: ReportInput, options?: ReportOptions): string {
  const opts = {
    separator: "=",
    bullet: "-",
    sections: ["header", "tasks", "footer"],
    theme: "default",
    locale: "en",
    outputFormat: "text" as const,
    ...options,
  };

  const theme = THEMES[opts.theme];
  if (!theme) throw new Error(`no theme registered under: ${opts.theme}`);
  const msgs = MESSAGES[opts.locale];
  if (!msgs) throw new Error(`no messages for locale: ${opts.locale}`);

  const lines: string[] = [];

  for (const section of opts.sections) {
    if (section === "header") {
      lines.push(input.title);
      lines.push(opts.separator.repeat(input.title.length));
    } else if (section === "tasks") {
      for (const task of input.tasks) {
        const marker = task.done ? theme.doneMarker : theme.openMarker;
        lines.push(`${opts.bullet} ${marker} ${task.title} (${task.hours}h)`);
      }
    } else if (section === "summary") {
      const done = input.tasks.filter((t) => t.done).length;
      const totalHours = input.tasks.reduce((sum, t) => sum + t.hours, 0);
      lines.push(
        `${msgs.doneLabel}: ${done}`,
        `${msgs.openLabel}: ${input.tasks.length - done}`,
        `${msgs.hoursLabel}: ${totalHours}h`,
      );
    } else if (section === "footer") {
      const done = input.tasks.filter((t) => t.done).length;
      const totalHours = input.tasks.reduce((sum, t) => sum + t.hours, 0);
      lines.push(
        `${done}/${input.tasks.length} ${msgs.done}, ${totalHours}h ${msgs.total}`,
      );
    } else {
      throw new Error(`no renderer for section: ${section}`);
    }
  }

  return lines.join("\n");
}
